title: Decompose handle_relay_event into per-message-type handlers
description:
handle_relay_event spans 442 lines (94-536) with 11 message types in a single match. This defeats isolatable testing and obscures control flow.

Extract separate async fns for each type:
- handle_directory_list()
- handle_user_joined()
- handle_user_left()
- handle_user_nickname()
- handle_deliver()
- handle_sealed_deliver()
- handle_whisper_deliver()
- handle_key_package_ready()

Wire them via a dispatch table or sub-match. This will improve:
- Testability (each handler can be tested independently)
- Readability (small, focused functions)
- Reusability (handlers can be called from other contexts)
close_reason: deferred to backlog; P3/P4 style issues, not blocking epic completion
